b3b5536e.name: look_over_surprise
b3b5536e.prompt: Turn the girl to face the camera directly: head and shoulders pivoted three-quarters toward the viewer with mild surprise — brows lifted, eyes wide, mouth slightly open in a small 'oh' as if she just heard a doorbell. Her hair stays in a single high ponytail at the back; her left hand still rests on the notebook holding the pencil. Keep her head the same size as in the source — do not zoom in or enlarge the face. Do not change the sky, room, colors, lighting, framing, or anything else — only her body, head, and expression change.

a77d1622.prompt: She turns her head and shoulders to her right, looking up from the notebook and over toward the viewer. Brows lift, eyes widen. Her mouth stays closed during the turn and only parts at the very end into a small surprised "oh". She settles into a paused look-over pose facing the camera. Lips do not move during the turn — no talking, no chewing, no mouth flapping.

description: lofi-girl pose graph v5: three parallel loops. Canonical loop (cycle 10, source minutes 20-50 of 60), early-variant loop (cycle 0, minutes 0-16), late-variant loop (cycle 25, minutes 50-60). 24 nodes (8 junctions per loop), 32 edges (24 ring + 8 swap). All edges are real contiguous source clips. Junctions placed at low-spread phases where all 30 source cycles agree visually, so cross-loop swaps are imperceptible.
